options.name: --stdin
options.description: Read source from stdin

options.name: --framework
options.description: Target framework (e.g., net8.0)

options.name: --project
options.description: Project (.csproj or directory) for NuGet resolution

options.name: --region
options.description: Extract a named #region from the source file

options.name: --no-restore
options.description: Skip automatic dotnet restore

options.name: --cache-dir
options.description: Directory for disk-based result caching

options.name: --complog
options.description: Complog file for portable compilation (no SDK needed)

options.name: --complog-project
options.description: Project to select from multi-project complog

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to twohash.config.json (default: auto-discover)
Render options:

options.name: --theme
options.description: Color theme (github-dark, github-light; default: github-dark)

options.name: --standalone
options.description: Output a full HTML page instead of a fragment

options.name: --output
options.description: Write HTML to a file instead of stdout
